name: robot-markdown-companion
description: Robot Companion for Robot Framework: return/value/enum intelligence with synchronized documentation preview.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:return-field-name-style && npm run test:ui

commands.title: Use Robot Companion as Default Folding Provider

robotCompanion.enableCodeLens.description: Show CodeLens above each [Documentation] block to open rendered preview.

robotCompanion.enableHoverPreview.description: Show rendered documentation preview on hover within documentation lines.

robotCompanion.enableEnumValueHover.description: Show enum value hints when hovering named argument values in Robot keyword calls.

robotCompanion.enableEnumArgumentFallbac.description: Allow lower-confidence enum/type-hint fallback by argument name across keywords when no direct keyword argument mapping is found.

robotCompanion.enumCompletionDisplayMode.description: Control whether enum completions after named arguments insert enum member names, literal values, or both.

robotCompanion.logLevel.description: Controls how much Robot Companion writes to the dedicated Output channel. Use `trace` for very verbose internals such as folding diagnostics.

robotCompanion.enableVariableValueHover.description: Show variable value hover when a local Set Variable assignment is found in the same test/keyword before the cursor.

robotCompanion.enableTypedVariableComple.description: Show type-matched local return-variable suggestions in named argument value positions (for example `${bp}` for `businesspartner=`).

robotCompanion.enableReturnMemberComplet.description: Show `${var.}` member completions for resolved return variables in named argument value positions.

robotCompanion.returnFieldNameStyle.description: Controls whether return hover/explorer/member access uses camelCase aliases (`statusCode`), raw `snake_case`, or both when the resolved Python class supports CamelCase access.

robotCompanion.returnIncludeProperties.description: Include Python `@property` members in return hover/explorer/member access and technical return details when they are indexed from the resolved return type.

robotCompanion.returnMemberCompletionMax.description: Maximum member depth used by `${var.}` return-member completions in named argument values.

robotCompanion.enableReturnValueHover.description: Show structured return hints when hovering a variable assigned from a keyword call.

robotCompanion.enableReturnExplorer.description: Enable the Robot Return Explorer side view and keep it synced with the cursor.

robotCompanion.indexImportFolderPatterns.description: Workspace-relative glob roots that Robot Companion indexes (for Python, .resource, and keyword .robot scans).

robotCompanion.indexExcludeFolderPattern.description: Workspace-relative folder/glob patterns excluded from Robot Companion indexing.

robotCompanion.autoSyncSelection.description: Synchronize the side preview with the cursor position in active .robot files.

robotCompanion.enableOpenFilePrewarm.description: Prewarm runtime caches for open Robot files so side panel/hover data is available faster.

robotCompanion.prewarmMode.description: Choose whether prewarming runs for all open Robot files or only the active one.

robotCompanion.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for reparsing documentation after edits.

robotCompanion.hoverLineLimit.description: Maximum number of documentation lines shown inside hover preview before truncation.

robotCompanion.enumHoverMaxEnums.description: Maximum number of matching enum types shown in enum hover.

robotCompanion.enumHoverMaxMembers.description: Maximum number of enum members shown per enum in enum hover.

robotCompanion.returnHoverMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested option depth shown in return hover (1 = top-level fields + one nested level).

robotCompanion.returnPreviewMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested option depth shown in the Robot Return Explorer side view.

robotCompanion.returnHintArgumentMaxDept.description: Maximum nested access depth shown in the 'Return Hint For Argument Value' section (hover + side panel).

robotCompanion.returnSubtypeResolutionMo.description: How generic return subtypes are resolved (for example list[T], ListWrapper[T]).

robotCompanion.returnSubtypeIncludeConta.description: Container names allowed for subtype resolution in 'include' mode (case-insensitive).

robotCompanion.returnSubtypeExcludeConta.description: Container names blocked for subtype resolution in 'exclude' mode (case-insensitive).

robotCompanion.returnMaxFieldsPerType.description: Maximum number of fields shown per return object type. Set to `0` for no limit.

robotCompanion.returnTechnicalMaxDepth.description: Maximum nested depth shown in the technical (developer) section of return explorer.

robotCompanion.returnTechnicalMaxFieldsP.description: Maximum fields shown per type in the technical (developer) section.

robotCompanion.enableReturnTypeDiskCache.description: Persist worker return type cache to disk per workspace for faster startup reuse.

robotCompanion.returnTypeCacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of cached return type entries kept in worker memory and persisted disk cache.

robotCompanion.variableHoverLineLimit.description: Maximum number of Set Variable value lines shown inside variable hover before truncation.
